raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute because I never received the merchandise on XX/XX/2026. CitBank changed correspondence from mail to online because I never received the outcome. I called on XX/XX/2026 after receiving an email telling me my payment was late. XXXX told me they closed the dispute because I didnt respond. When making the dispute I told the agent I never received the merchandise. My Best Buy bill never been late, I pay the bill in full before the next month. Citibank is sending credit reports inaccurate rating. To prevent issues I pick up my order from the store to make sure I receive it, they told me they mailed it and I never received the merchandise. On XX/XX/2026 I went to XXXX and they gave me a picture of my porch with no merchandise on it, again I didnt receive the item and didnt sign for the XXXX. This is really troubling because I didnt receive the items.
